$comment: CodeGraph knowledge-graph MCP server is registered in .mcp.json. These entries auto-allow its read-only query tools and make sure the CLI is installed and the project is indexed at the start of every session.

hooks.command: command -v codegraph >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm install -g @colbymchenry/codegraph >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; [ -f .codegraph/codegraph.db ] && codegraph sync >/dev/null 2>&1 || codegraph init >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
